summary: RE Templates feature in Planning Board - FULLY VERIFIED. All CRUD operations working: Create template with name/sqft/scope items, Edit template (pre-filled dialog), Delete template (with confirmation), Search/filter templates. Backend APIs (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/crm/re-templates) all passing. Frontend UI shows correct columns: Template Name, Sq.ft, Scope Items count, Estimated Total, Created By, Created date, Edit/Delete actions.

success_rate.backend: 100% - 10/10 core tests passed (4 skipped due to cleanup between tests)

test_credentials.Planning: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> 'Planning' button (Suresh Iyer - planning@constructionos.com)

seed_data_creation: Created test templates during testing (Villa Premium Test, Template To Delete) - cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: RE Templates feature fully implemented and tested. Backend API endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/crm/re-templates. Frontend: PlanningBoard.jsx has RE Templates tab with full CRUD UI. Key data-testids: tab-re-templates, create-template-btn, template-search, template-name-input, template-sqft-input, add-scope-item-btn, scope-item-name-{index}, scope-item-qty-{index}, scope-item-rate-{index}, save-template-btn, edit-template-{id}, delete-template-{id}, templates-table.

RE Templates Tab Visible.details: RE Templates tab visible in Planning Board tab bar with FileText icon

Templates List View.details: Shows table with columns: Template Name, Sq.ft, Scope Items (count badge), Estimated Total, Created By, Created date, Actions (Edit/Delete)

Create Template Dialog.details: Dialog opens with Template Name input, Sq.ft input, Scope of Work Items table with Add Item button

Add Scope Items.details: Scope items table has Description, Qty, Unit (dropdown), Rate, Total columns. Total auto-calculates from Qty * Rate

Save Template.details: Save Template button creates template, shows success toast 'Template created', template appears in list

Edit Template.details: Edit button (pencil icon) opens dialog pre-filled with existing data. Update Template button saves changes with 'Template updated' toast

Delete Template.details: Delete button (trash icon) shows confirmation dialog, deletes template with 'Template deleted' toast

Search Templates.details: Search input filters templates by name in real-time

Estimated Total Calculation.details: Estimated Total at bottom of dialog shows sum of all scope item totals

Multiple Templates.details: Multiple templates can be created and displayed in list (tested with 5+ templates)

Backend API - Create.details: POST /api/crm/re-templates creates template with auto-calculated totals

Backend API - Read.details: GET /api/crm/re-templates returns list, GET /api/crm/re-templates/{id} returns single template

Access Control.details: Only planning, super_admin, general_manager can create/edit/delete. Unauthenticated requests return 401
